highlights.text: Mt. Pilatus sunset excursion with alpine panorama
Jungfraujoch private photo session at Top of Europe
Lake Brienz boat excursion & Matterhorn-view Zermatt stay

itinerary.title: Romantic Switzerland Honeymoon
itinerary.tagline: Lucerne • Mt. Pilatus • Interlaken • Zermatt • Matterhorn
itinerary.overview: Begin your life together in one of the world's most breathtaking landscapes. This TRAGUIN curated Swiss honeymoon sanctuary is designed for intimacy, luxury, and awe-inspiring beauty — perfectly balancing cozy alpine retreats, scenic romantic excursions, and world-class hospitality across Lucerne, Interlaken, and Zermatt. Includes private chauffeur transfers, lakeside suites, and 24/7 honeymoon concierge support.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Switzerland honeymoon package (CH-002): Lucerne, Mt. Pilatus, Jungfraujoch, Lake Brienz, and Zermatt with Matterhorn views.

days.title: Arrival & Intimate Lucerne Welcome
days.description: Arrive in Zurich and private chauffeur transfer to Lucerne. Check into your romantic lakeside suite. Evening lakeside walk and intimate welcome dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, lakeside orientation walk

days.title: Mt. Pilatus Sunset Experience
days.description: A gentle day in Lucerne, followed by a sunset excursion to Mt. Pilatus. Witness the spectacular alpine panorama — an exclusive romantic experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mt. Pilatus sunset excursion

days.title: Transfer to Interlaken
days.description: Scenic train transfer to Interlaken. Check into your luxury alpine retreat with mountain views, perfect for couples.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic rail transfer to Interlaken

days.title: Jungfraujoch Romance
days.description: A spectacular journey to the Top of Europe. Enjoy a private photo session amidst the pristine snow — creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jungfraujoch Top of Europe excursion, private photo session

days.title: Alpine Lakes & Leisure
days.description: Leisure day in Interlaken. Enjoy a private boat excursion on Lake Brienz, soaking in the serene mountain beauty together.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Lake Brienz boat excursion

days.title: Zermatt Luxury Escape
days.description: Transfer to Zermatt. Check into your ultra-luxury boutique suite with iconic Matterhorn views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic transfer to Zermatt

days.title: Matterhorn Celebration
days.description: Enjoy a day of private leisure and spa treatments in Zermatt, followed by a candlelit farewell dinner celebrating your romantic honeymoon.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private chauffeur transfer to the airport, completing your premium Swiss honeymoon.

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in handpicked romantic hotels across Lucerne, Interlaken, and Zermatt
Private chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Scenic Swiss rail transfer to Interlaken
Mt. Pilatus sunset excursion and Jungfraujoch Top of Europe visit
Private Lake Brienz boat excursion for couples
International airfare and Switzerland entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
